key_risks: Semiconductor/momentum cohort reverses sharply on tech profit-taking after Nasdaq's -1.3% day
Sticky inflation (core PCE 3.3%, hawkish SEP) triggers risk-off and yield spike hurting growth tilts
Biotech high-beta volatility reverses its recent +6.94% spike
PCE data on June 25 surprises hawkish, pressuring equities into the exit close

portfolio.rationale: Strong momentum (+3.37% 7d, +16% 30d) led by Taiwan/Korea strength; semis remain the leading risk-on trade.
Core benchmark exposure; balances active tilts and limits tracking error against the scoring benchmark.
Persistent factor strength (+3.47% 7d, +13.83% 30d) tends to carry forward over short windows.
Stable cash-like ballast given sticky inflation, hawkish FOMC SEP, and elevated yields.
Sharp positive momentum (+6.94% 7d) suggests near-term continuation in a recovering risk segment.

portfolio_rationale: Tilt modestly toward proven short-term momentum leaders (semis, momentum factor, biotech) while anchoring with benchmark SPY and short Treasuries to manage downside, since macro shows sticky inflation and a hawkish Fed.
rationale_summary: Momentum continuation in semis/momentum factor plus benchmark core, hedged with short-duration Treasuries.
